currency.description: The currency of the MonetaryAccountBank as an ISO 4217 formatted currency code.

description.description: The description of the MonetaryAccountBank. Defaults to 'bunq account'.

daily_limit.description: The daily spending limit Amount of the MonetaryAccountBank. Defaults to 1000 EUR. Currency must match the MonetaryAccountBank's currency. Limited to 10000 EUR.

avatar_uuid.description: The UUID of the Avatar of the MonetaryAccountBank.

status.description: The status of the MonetaryAccountBank. Can be: ACTIVE, BLOCKED, CANCELLED or PENDING_REOPEN

sub_status.description: The sub-status of the MonetaryAccountBank providing extra information regarding the status. Will be NONE for ACTIVE or PENDING_REOPEN, COMPLETELY or ONLY_ACCEPTING_INCOMING for BLOCKED and REDEMPTION_INVOLUNTARY, REDEMPTION_VOLUNTARY or PERMANENT for CANCELLED.

reason.description: The reason for voluntarily cancelling (closing) the MonetaryAccountBank, can only be OTHER.

reason_description.description: The optional free-form reason for voluntarily cancelling (closing) the MonetaryAccountBank. Can be any user provided message.

display_name.description: The legal name of the user / company using this monetary account.

country_iban.description: The country of the monetary account IBAN.

created.description: The timestamp of the MonetaryAccountBank's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the MonetaryAccountBank's last update.

overdraft_limit.description: The maximum Amount the MonetaryAccountBank can be 'in the red'.

balance.description: The current available balance Amount of the MonetaryAccountBank.

user_id.description: The id of the User who owns the MonetaryAccountBank.
